content:
The user wants me to create webpage 2 (page-2.html) and link it back to page 1 (index.html) without breaking page 1. Looking at the requirements: - page-2.html: title text must include 'Entropy Page 2'; backlink href must be 'index.html' - The existing index.html should not be broken I need to create site/page-2.html with: - Title containing 'Entropy Page 2' - A backlink to index.html Let me create the page-2.html file. { "files": [ { "path": "site/page-2.html", "content": "\n\n\n \n \n Entropy Page 2\n\n\n
\n Back to Entropy Page 1\n
\n
\n

Welcome to Entropy Page 2

\n

This is the main content area for the second page.

\n
\n\n" } ], "notes": "Created page-2.html with title containing 'Entropy Page 2' and backlink href pointing to 'index.html'." }
